title: Exporting to PDF from GANTT chart
excerpt: So I am having trouble exporting my GANTT chart to pdf.  Not sure what is going on but I was hoping someone could help me troubleshoot.

posts.author: bnunez (Brian Nunez)
posts.cookedHtml: So I am having trouble exporting my GANTT chart to pdf. Not sure what is going on but I was hoping someone could help me troubleshoot.

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Brian Nunez:

I am having trouble exporting my GANTT chart to pdf. Not sure what is going on but I was hoping someone could help me troubleshoot.

Hello @bnunez, you should be easily able to export to PDF. Happy to help troubleshoot if you share some more info

image441×294 16.1 KB

If you’re having trouble exporting your Gantt chart to PDF in monday.com, make sure you’re using the Gantt widget on a Dashboard , not just the board view. Click the three-dot menu in the top-right of the widget and select “Export to PDF” . If the option isn’t showing or the export fails, try refreshing the page, checking your browser’s pop-up settings, or switching browsers. If it still doesn’t work, it might be a permissions or plan-level issue

posts.author: bnunez (Brian Nunez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Clarey,

Thank you for responding and for the detailed description. We were having the issue where the export fails. It had been working the whole time, so this was a new development.

The export to pdf capability was down for around 3 days for us. After three days everything went back to normal, and we were able to export to pdf without any issues.

Just to confirm(there were some permissions errors on the chrome console), so it’s possible that could have been the culprit.
